response.overview: On the night before his brother’s wedding, a reserved Andrew is convinced by his carefree best friend, Chris to attend a house party. What begins as a simple night out quickly spirals into emotional confrontations, resurfacing feelings for an old crush, and the revelation that the two friends may soon be heading in different directions. Over the course of one chaotic night, they must confront growing up, loyalty, and what it really means to move forward in life.
response.tagline: One night out before life pulls them apart.
response.title: On Our Way
